source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to Crane/Lifting Device

actions_taken: Expanded metal added to handrails to prevent personnel from crossing barrier
Hazards associated with body placement added to Written Risk Assessment for future jobs
MEDEVAC helicopter dispatched for onshore medical treatment
event.summary: On January 8, 2015, a Floorhand was injured when his left leg was caught between the ZBack Guide Arm (ZGA) and a handrail while transporting drill pipe on the rig floor during completion operations. The injured party sustained a laceration and fracture to his lower left leg and was expected to be out of work for approximately eight weeks.
recommendations: Houma District has no recommendations for the BSEE Region at this time
key_phrases: Body positioning in relation to moving equipment

hazards.name: Pinch Point Between ZGA and Handrail

threats.name: Personnel Body Part Contact with Moving ZGA
Inadequate Barrier Design Allowing Personnel Access to Pinch Point

consequences.name: Personnel Laceration and Fracture to Lower Leg

controls.name: Written Risk Assessment Prior to Job

supporting_text: Although a written risk assessment was done prior to performing the job, crew members failed to address the hazard associated with body positioning in relation to moving equipment

controls.name: Handrail Barrier Around ZGA
controls.barrier_role: Physical barrier to prevent personnel contact with moving equipment

supporting_text: The handrail installed around the ZGA was put into place to protect personnel from walking into the skid pan located along the tracks of the ZGA. Although this served as a proper barricade for the open hole, it failed to provide a sufficient barrier to prevent employees from coming in contact with the moving equipment
The handrail installed around the ZGA was an inadequate barrier for protecting personnel from the moving equipment

controls.name: Crew Positioning and Work Planning
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to manage personnel positioning relative to moving equipment

supporting_text: The IP positioned himself between the aft side pipe rack and the ZGA. This position allowed the IP to stay out of the ZGA's way as it moved back and forth, while maintaining good visuals of the Iron Roughneck and fingerboards of the forward pipe rack
While looking up at the fingerboards, the IP inadvertently placed his left foot on the bottom rung of the handrail that guarded the ZGA

controls.name: Medical Response and MEDEVAC
controls.barrier_role: Emergency response to minimize injury severity

supporting_text: The job was immediately stopped and the crew members assisted in removing the IP's leg from in between the ZGA and the handrail
After consulting with onshore medical support, the decision was made to dispatch a MEDEVAC helicopter to transport the IP onshore for further medical treatment

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
